name: BLACKBIRD

abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Blinded by the Light
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to make a Scheme marker in base contact with a friendly model within 8".

actions.name: Phantasmal Knife
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has an Entranced token, this action receives a (+).

actions.name: Spotlight
actions.effects: Target gains an Entranced token. If this action receives a raise, move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Close-Up Magic
triggers.text: Make a Decoy marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Strike the Set
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target. Then remove the target. If the target was a Decoy marker, draw a card.

triggers.name: Thief's Pocket
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 2 from Minion (2) characteristic
